style: Premium Diablo-like square action slot bitmap frame. Dark stone, black iron, brass edge, readable center. No SVG.

ontology.clause: ONTOLOGY ACTIVE: combat skill slot frames must preserve quick key readability and icon visibility.

prompt: Create one square bitmap UI frame for a Diablo-like dark fantasy ARPG combat skill slot. Black carved stone frame, blackened iron bevel, tarnished brass edge, dark readable center for an icon and key label, subtle worn texture. No embedded text, no letters, no numbers, no icon, no character, no watermark. Fill the full canvas edge-to-edge; no white canvas, no outside margin. Avoid flat vector, SVG look, CSS gradient look, plastic shine, cartoon UI, bokeh, lens flare, white diagonal shine. Opaque PNG, production game UI slot frame.
acceptance: Square action slot texture with readable center.
No text, icon, character, or watermark is embedded.
